case_title: ALAN DAVID MORRIS et al VS. MIKE NGUYEN

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT SERVED MAY-22-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MORRIS, ALAN DAVID ATKINSON, IAN ATKINSON, PHILIP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,475.45 FILED BY MORRIS, ALAN DAVID ATKINSON, IAN ATKINSON, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT NGUYEN, MIKE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS (3) WERE PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. ALL THREE CROSS--DEFENDANTS WAIVE BOTH DEFECTIVE AND UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT, ON THE CROSS--COMPLAINT. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE DEFENDANTS CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, MIKE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT MORRIS, ALAN DAVID ATKINSON, IAN ATKINSON, PHILIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MORRIS, ALAN DAVID ATKINSON, IAN ATKINSON, PHILIP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NGUYEN, MIKE $3,751.45 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,826.45, INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT IS AN AWARD OF $3,000.00 UNDER SECTION 37.10 B OF THE SAN FRANCISCO RENT ORDINANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
